summary: Social platform where users can see follower counts and follower lists

existing_features.title: In UserProfileView, display the follower count as a clickable element. When clicked, open a modal or popover listing the display names (or principal-derived fallback) of all followers of that profile, visible to all visitors including unauthenticated users.

new_feature_requests.summary: Show followers to everyone - make follower lists/counts publicly visible to all users
Expose a public backend query that returns the list of followers for any given user principal, callable without authentication.
